JUDGE PRO TEM KAZ MANIWA; K REINFEIN REPORTER; JPASTOR CLERK C/C FOR S/C. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ATTY J MARGULIES FOR PLTF AND DEFT DAVE KRZYSIK PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PARTIES STIPULATED FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES. PLTF TO FILE STIP AND JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRZYSIK, DAVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2450 BAYSHORE BLVD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-13-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT COMPLIES W/STIP, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS OF STIP, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS. EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 5PM ON 9-13-96.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KRZYSIK, DAVE
